name: packedjson
head: 02e2b1a590a32f6f3ddb25e988045aeb8acf691a
author: Araq
description: packedjson is an alternative Nim implementation for JSON. The JSON is essentially kept as a single string in order to save memory over a more traditional tree representation.

releases.d: packedjson is an alternative Nim implementation for JSON. The JSON is essentially kept as a single string in order to save memory over a more traditional tree representation.
